responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete all IVX modules end-to-end (build 22) AND perform full Vercel audit and safe removal of all obsolete Vercel dependencies from the codebase

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app`
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx`
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID NOT set — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify EXISTING codebase only
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, tunnel URLs, or any Vercel URL
- No Vercel dependency in production Android APK; no temporary Vercel preview URLs; no duplicate web/backend architecture
- All modules must display real live data, not placeholders, mocks, stale hardcoded totals or demo content
- Per-module error boundaries — failed module must not crash entire app
- 50-test QA matrix on real Android device required for definition of done
- GitHub SHA, Android build SHA, and deployed production SHA must match
- Inventory → replace → switch traffic → verify → remove → verify again — do not delete first and test later

## Progress
### Done
- **Build 21 fixes (still present in code)**:
  - `expo/app/index.tsx` — initial route redirect to /login or /(tabs)
  - `expo/metro.config.js` — try/catch resilience for @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro
  - `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx` — removed hardcoded password from loginOwnerPasswordless
  - `expo/lib/startup-trace.ts` — all 21 required checkpoints
  - Build 21 APK built and uploaded (SHA-256: `352f7a8ab2ddb53262979da4c1e80647098e7c65270fdbe32a4fd1b7757ab618`, download: `https://litter.catbox.moe/tf2hx3.apk`)
- **Build 22 Phase 1 — Maximum Update Depth fix**:
  - Root cause: `expo/lib/email-context.tsx` queryFn called setState inside queryFn → infinite loop
  - Second cause: `expo/hooks/useReelsFeed.ts` `queueMicrotask(() => setAllVideos(data))` during render
  - Third cause: `expo/app/videos.tsx` engagement object changed identity every render
  - Fix: removed setState from queryFn, merged duplicate useEffects, replaced queueMicrotask with guarded useEffect, destructured engagement to stable callbacks
  - `expo/components/DiagnosticErrorBoundary.tsx` — rewritten with error categories, trace IDs, sanitized messages
  - `expo/app/_layout.tsx` — ProviderBoundary now shows categorized error with trace ID instead of "Email unavailable"
- **Build 22 Phase 2 — Move internal metrics to Admin**:
  - Created `expo/app/admin/business-overview.tsx` — protected admin screen with business metrics
  - Modified `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx` — replaced PortfolioSnapshot with UserActivitySnapshot
  - Added business-overview to admin index and _layout
  - Renamed `expo/app/(tabs)/index.tsx` → `expo/app/(tabs)/crm.tsx` to fix duplicate index route
- **Build 22 Phase 3-4 — Reels audit and progressive loading**:
  - `expo/app/videos.tsx` — progressive loading (page of 10, onEndReached), windowSize=5, dedup via loadedIds ref
- **Build 22 Phase 5 — Video upload pipeline**:
  - Created `expo/lib/video-upload-pipeline.ts` — staged upload with validation, presigned URL, XHR progress, polling
- **Build 22 Phase 6 — Members progressive loading**:
  - `expo/app/admin/members.tsx` — displayCount state, PAGE_SIZE=20, onEndReached pagination
- **Build 22 Phase 13 — Per-module error recovery**:
  - Created `expo/components/ModuleErrorBoundary.tsx` — per-module crash isolation
  - Wrapped reels FlatList in ModuleErrorBoundary in `app/videos.tsx`
- **Build 22 version bump**: `expo/app.config.ts` — versionCode 22
- **Vercel audit Phase 1-2 — Complete dependency search**:
  - Active repo: `/home/user/rork-app`, branch `main`, HEAD SHA `26ff17849d49ab878a2616c08740f931c9db2f4a`
  - No `vercel.json`, `next.config.*`, or `.vercel/` directory found anywhere in repo
  - No Vercel env vars (VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_PROJECT_ID, VERCEL_ORG_ID, VERCEL_ENV, VERCEL_URL) in Expo app code
  - No `from 'ai'` or `from '@ai-sdk'` imports in any Expo source file — `ai` package in `expo/package.json` is unused
  - `@vercel/oidc` is only a transitive dep of `@ai-sdk/gateway` in `bun.lock`
  - Classification: `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` = ACTIVE AND REQUIRED (backend AI provider, not Vercel hosting, not in APK); `vercel_ai_gateway` provider name = ACTIVE (AI Gateway product name); Vercel exit screen/API = OBSOLETE; vercel-tool.ts = OBSOLETE; VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA = DEAD (Render provides RENDER_GIT_COMMIT)
- **Vercel removal Phase A — Expo app cleanup**:
  - Deleted `expo/app/ivx/vercel-exit.tsx` (obsolete migration planning screen)
  - Deleted `expo/__tests__/ivx-vercel-exit.test.ts`
  - `expo/app/ivx/_layout.tsx` — removed `IVX_VERCEL_EXIT_OPTIONS` and `<Stack.Screen name="vercel-exit">` route
  - `expo/src/modules/ivx-owner-ai/services/ivxAIRequestService.ts` — changed `GATEWAY_CHAT_COMPLETIONS_PATH` from `/v2/vercel/v1/chat/completions` to `/v1/chat/completions`
  - `expo/__tests__/ivx-owner-ai-auth-propagation.test.ts` — changed test endpoint from `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` to `api.ivxholding.com`
- **Vercel removal Phase B — Backend cleanup**:
  - Deleted `backend/api/ivx-vercel-exit.ts` (obsolete migration planning API, ~1500 lines)
  - Deleted `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/vercel-tool.ts`
  - `backend/hono.ts` — removed all VercelExit imports (14 handlers), removed all `/api/ivx/vercel-exit/*` routes (12 routes), removed `VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA` fallback from `LIVE_COMMIT_SHA`, removed `handleVercelStatus` import and `/api/ivx/deploy-tools/vercel` route
  - `backend/api/public-chat.ts` — removed `VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA` fallback
  - `backend/api/ivx-deployment-tools.ts` — removed VercelTool import, `handleVercelStatus()` function, and Vercel route from comments
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/credential-sync.ts` — removed VercelTool import, `vercel_env` CredentialSource, `VERCEL_TOKEN` from registry, Vercel env discovery from `discoverAllCredentials()`, `vercel` from category type
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/deployment-brain.ts` — removed VercelTool import, Vercel platform check (step 5), `vercel` from PlatformStatus type, `vercel` from commits output
  - `backend/services/ivx-tool-engine.ts` — removed VercelTool import and `vercelToken()` function
  - `backend/services/ivx-secure-vault.ts` — removed `IVX_VERCEL_TOKEN` vault entry, `testVercelToken()` function, `vercel` from VaultCategory type, Vercel token comment
  - `backend/services/ivx-independence-verifier.ts` — removed `VERCEL_ACCESS` capability check (step 7)
  - `backend/services/ivx-technology-scanner.ts` — renamed `render_vercel_aws_automation` to `render_aws_automation`, removed Vercel from label/keywords/tool listing
  - `backend/services/ivx-access-status-narrative-gate.ts` — removed `vercel` from access status regex

### In Progress
- **Vercel env var cleanup** — `.env.example` has no VERCEL_* vars; no Vercel env vars found in Expo code; deploy scripts still reference `vercel_ai_gateway` as string patterns (not in APK bundle)
- **TypeScript and lint validation** — not yet run after Vercel cleanup changes
- **Build 22 APK assembly** — Gradle `assembleRelease` repeatedly timing out at 60s sandbox limit

### Blocked
- Gradle build times out at 60s sandbox limit — needs arm64-only + cached tasks
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox
- `expo-location` v15.1.1 incompatible with Expo SDK 54 — Java errors, autolinked but unused

## Key Decisions
- `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` is ACTIVE AND REQUIRED — it's the Vercel AI Gateway product (AI provider), NOT Vercel hosting. Backend uses it via `createGateway()` from `ai` package. Not referenced in Expo APK bundle.
- `vercel_ai_gateway` provider name kept in backend `ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts` — it's the AI provider identifier, not a hosting dependency
- Vercel exit screen and API were migration planning tools, now obsolete and removed
- `VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA` was a dead fallback — Render provides `RENDER_GIT_COMMIT`
- `GATEWAY_CHAT_COMPLETIONS_PATH` changed from `/v2/vercel/v1/chat/completions` to `/v1/chat/completions` (removing Vercel path segment from client-side dead code)
- Email context queryFn must NEVER call setState — return status in query data, sync via single guarded useEffect
- Internal business metrics moved to protected admin route
- Reels uses progressive loading (page of 10, onEndReached) instead of fetching all 24 at once
- arm64-v8a only architecture to cut native compilation time

## Next Steps
- Clean up remaining `vercel_ai_gateway` string references in `expo/deploy/scripts/ivx-internal-app-completion-proof.mjs` and `expo/deploy/scripts/chatgpt-e2e-audit.mjs`
- Run TypeScript check on both `expo/` and `backend/` to verify no broken imports after Vercel removal
- Run lint check
- Verify no Vercel references remain in Expo source (excluding deploy scripts and bun.lock transitive deps)
- Remove unused `ai` package from `expo/package.json` if confirmed no Expo source imports it
- Get Gradle build to complete (build 22 APK)
- Complete remaining build 22 phases: 7 (projects/deals progressive loading), 8-9 (data fetching + realtime), 10-11 (image/media optimization + navigation), 12 (admin CRUD), 14-15 (QA matrix + deployment)
- Run full 50-test QA matrix on real device
- Final Vercel verification: repository-wide search confirming no Vercel URL in Expo bundle, no obsolete Vercel env vars, no active calls to vercel.app

## Critical Context
- No `vercel.json`, `next.config.*`, or `.vercel/` directory exists in the repo — IVX never had a Vercel-hosted frontend or Next.js app
- The Vercel dependencies were: (1) `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` as AI provider (ACTIVE, backend-only), (2) Vercel exit migration tooling (OBSOLETE, removed), (3) `VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA` env fallback (DEAD, removed), (4) `@vercel/oidc` transitive dep in bun.lock (harmless)
- `expo-location` v15.1.1 is incompatible with Expo SDK 54 — Java `cannot find symbol` errors; `expo-location/android/` dir was removed to prevent autolinking failures
- Previous build 21 took 63s for `assembleRelease` — just over the 60s sandbox timeout
- Many screens still import from `expo/mocks/` — need removal per Phase 9

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/ivx/vercel-exit.tsx` — DELETED (obsolete migration screen)
- `expo/__tests__/ivx-vercel-exit.test.ts` — DELETED
- `backend/api/ivx-vercel-exit.ts` — DELETED (obsolete migration API, ~1500 lines)
- `backend/services/ivx-deployment-tools/vercel-tool.ts` — DELETED
- `backend/hono.ts` — main API router; Vercel exit routes and VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA removed
